item.title: Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Mac USB Digital Media Data Recovery software for restoring all erased files and folder from memory card. Smart mac file retrieval utility uses inbuilt disk scanning technique to rescue misplaced wallpapers, video clips, music files, documents, text files, photographs etc from virus contained pen drive. Expert mac data retrieval program supports all file extensions like jpg, gif, tiff, png, bmp, avi, mov, txt, doc, ppt, pdf, exe, zip, rar etc to revive deleted files and folder. Best mac data rescue utility is able to revive all files and folder with long name and size.

[read more]
item.description:
Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Mac USB Digital Media Data Recovery software for restoring all erased files and folder from memory card. Smart mac file retrieval utility uses inbuilt disk scanning technique to rescue misplaced wallpapers, video clips, music files, documents, text files, photographs etc from virus contained pen drive. Expert mac data retrieval program supports all file extensions like jpg, gif, tiff, png, bmp, avi, mov, txt, doc, ppt, pdf, exe, zip, rar etc to revive deleted files and folder. Best mac data rescue utility is able to revive all files and folder with long name and size.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Pen Drive Recovery Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
No need of technical guidance to operate Mac USB Digital Media Data Recovery software for restoring all erased files and folder from memory card. Smart mac file retrieval utility uses inbuilt disk scanning technique to rescue misplaced wallpapers, video clips, music files, documents, text files, photographs etc from virus contained pen drive. Expert mac data retrieval program supports all file extensions like jpg, gif, tiff, png, bmp, avi, mov, txt, doc, ppt, pdf, exe, zip, rar etc to revive deleted files and folder. Best mac data rescue utility is able to revive all files and folder with long name and size.

item.title: Professional SMS Mobile Marketing [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Professional SMS Mobile Marketing [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsmobile
item.itunes:summary:
Professional SMS Mobile Marketing
(Internet Apps)
Download Group SMS software from www.bulksmsmobilemarketing.com that broadcast unlimited text message to group of mobile numbers in a few mouse clicks. Free Bulk SMS application send promotes your product and services by broadcasting SMS to any mobile network. Highly advance mobile SMS marketing application send birthday party invitation by transmitting unlimited text SMS from notebook in both English and Non-English font format to mobile. Professional SMS marketing bulk messaging tool easily broadcast transmit or broadcast unlimited message from notebook to cell phone in reasonable price. Effective SMS marketing program facilitates you to broadcast festival offers from computer to mobile phones. Easy to use SMS marketing software allow purchaser to broadcast cricket updates news by broadcasting messages of set of mobile numbers at much reasonable price. Professional group sms marketing utility has ability to broad cast all types of business details to group of mobile number in advance manner. Innovative bulk messaging software facilitates and authenticates you to send group text messages to thousands or individual person in advance manner. Simple to download official bulk messages software broadcast job alert, event notification, and business meetings details to mobile numbers in best possible way. Advance usable bulk SMS application is used to send and broadcast share market news and product advertisement from notebook to cell phone by providing communication service between groups of client. Features: * Bulk sms broadcasting software is designed with GUI interface that facilitates you to friendly work with software. * SMS marketing application helps you to send all types of business details from computer to global mobile network in reasonable price. * Mobile sms tool broadcast critical information from mobile to cell phone without using internet gateway. * Bulk SMS messaging application does not need ant technical skills to operate any application.

[read more]

item.title: Digital Camera Retrieval Tool For Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Digital Camera Retrieval Tool For Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recovermac
item.itunes:summary:
Digital Camera Retrieval Tool For Mac
(Utilities)
Mac Photo Recovery Program search and quickly regains deleted, lost or missing photographs, pictures, videos from your digital camera memory card using in-built disk scanning mechanism. Successfully restore corrupted clicks images and recorded video clipping from virus infected digital camera memory with the help of Professional Digital camera recovery software. Mac Data Restoration Application helps to bring out formatted or corrupted photos from digicam memory card.

[read more]

item.title: DataVare Outlook PST Split Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: DataVare Outlook PST Split Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datavare01
item.itunes:summary:
DataVare Outlook PST Split Tool
(Utilities)
One popular application for quickly splitting huge PST files into smaller portions is DataVare Outlook PST Split. Using this program, you may divide PST files based on folder, size, date, and other factors. Not a single piece of data is changed when separating. It's developed very well, so users can operate it on any OS system such as Windows and Mac, even any versions. The software has a simple and quick user interface that why it's easy to understand for all kinds of users without requiring any technical expertise. Users can separate up to 25 items per folder for free using the free trial version of the software. In addition, the technical support team is available 24x7, to solve the queries of our users.

[read more]

item.title: Magus OLM to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Magus OLM to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: jamiekaler
item.itunes:summary:
Magus OLM to PST Converter
(Utilities)
If you have a several orphan OLM files to open in Outlook for windows or Outlook 365 then you need to convert them into PST before actually exporting the file. For doing this, you can opt for Magus OLM to PST converter which is an easy to use solution to save multiple .olm files into PST file format keeping the folder structure and meta properties intact.

[read more]

item.title: Bulk SMS Mobile Phone Marketing [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Bulk SMS Mobile Phone Marketing [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bulksmsmobile
item.itunes:summary:
Bulk SMS Mobile Phone Marketing
(Internet Apps)
You can visit www.bulksmsmobilemarketing.com and download Bulk SMS Mobile Phone Marketing Software provides comprehensive solution to send same text SMS from computer or laptop using USB modem. Bulk SMS software is useful to deliver share market updates, greetings SMS, alerts, events, notification, reminders and other text messages via USB mobile modems. SMS Software is best way to communicate global people through sending instant text messages.

item.title: Magus OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Magus OST to PST Converter [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: jamiekaler
item.itunes:summary:
Magus OST to PST Converter
(Utilities)
If you are using Outlook and struggling with OST file accessibility then Magus OST to PST converter is for you. It is a smart tool created to export large OST files into PST file format keeping the folder structure and other associated data intact. You can easily save complete data from an OST file into PST file format in a hassle free manner.

[read more]
